summary: Comprehensive testing of Curriculum Planning Subagent feature completed. All backend APIs pass (13/13 tests), all frontend badges working correctly. The feature flow tested: assessment phase (cross-lang) → proficiency detection → planning phase → curriculum creation → learning phase.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/conversations with cross-lang (EN→FR) starts with phase='assessment'
Backend: POST /api/conversations with same-lang (EN→EN) starts with phase='learning'
Backend: POST /api/conversations with scenario starts with phase='learning'
Backend: GET /api/conversations/{id} includes 'phase' field
Backend: GET /api/conversations/{id}/curriculum returns 404 when no curriculum exists
Backend: GET /api/conversations/{id}/curriculum returns 404 for non-existent conversation
Backend: GET /api/conversations/{id}/curriculum returns curriculum with correct structure
Backend: Curriculum has all required fields (id, conversation_id, proficiency_level, timeline, goal, lessons, current_lesson, status)
Backend: Lessons have proper structure (lesson_number, title, topics, objective, status)
Backend: Curriculum status field has valid values (active/completed)
Backend: DELETE /api/conversations/all works correctly
Backend: POST /api/conversations/{id}/messages works during assessment phase
Backend: PATCH /api/conversations/{id}/proficiency sets proficiency level correctly
Backend: GET /api/conversations (list) includes 'phase' field
Frontend: Proficiency badge (data-testid='proficiency-badge') shows correctly with level colors
Frontend: Planning curriculum badge (data-testid='phase-planning-badge') shows during planning phase
Frontend: Curriculum progress badge (data-testid='curriculum-progress-badge') shows 'Lesson X/Y: title' when curriculum exists
Frontend: Tool badges show 'level detected' (green) when set_proficiency_level tool is used
Frontend: Tool badges show 'save curriculum' when curriculum is saved
Frontend: Planning badge disappears when phase transitions to learning
Frontend: Language pair badge (English → French) displays correctly
seed_data_creation: Created EN→FR conversation that progressed through full flow: assessment → planning → learning with 8-lesson curriculum
context_for_next_testing_agent: Curriculum Planning feature fully tested. Phase transitions work: assessment→planning (after set_proficiency_level) →learning (after save_curriculum). Conversation 'a552c27b-e84f-4be1-bcd0-7c8b58b2b8a1' has a full curriculum (8 lessons, Lesson 1 in_progress). Frontend badges: proficiency-badge (shows level), phase-planning-badge (shows during planning), curriculum-progress-badge (shows Lesson X/Y during learning).
